title: State Reception Hall
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''State Reception Hall''' was an area of the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] where the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] met with visiting dignitaries.

{{Loc-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
